QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_37

question.text: Running account settlement of client funds lying with Trading Members must be done:

answer.text: On both monthly and quarterly basis as per the calendar issued by stock exchanges
Only at the end of the financial year
Only when the client requests withdrawal
No settlement is required — funds can be retained indefinitely

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI mandates monthly and quarterly settlement of client running accounts. Exchanges jointly issue an annual calendar for these settlements. **The Trap:** Not just annually. Not only on client request. Indefinite retention is not allowed. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers client fund settlement requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Monthly/quarterly settlements ensure clients have access to their surplus funds — brokers cannot indefinitely hold client money beyond what's needed for open positions and margins.
